item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: I disagree with the notion that temporary restrictions on individual rights are always justified or properly regulated.

notes: Agent A begins rights-protective and becomes firmer about emergency-power abuse and safeguards. Agent B starts with conditional support for societal interests taking precedence in public safety or health cases, then moves toward a more balanced/skeptical position about emergency powers, judicial review, and accountability. Both agents engage directly with the temporary-restrictions/safeguards frame.
